verdict.answer_first: A: "Server-side rendered — or more precisely, prerendered/static — not client-side." B also answers first, but softer: "almost certainly the right call."
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder: "this isn't close" and gives one prescription: "ideal... static generation (SSG) / prerendering." B dilutes with SSR/SSG/ISR/table/stack follow-up.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to save: "static generation... at build time," "runtime SSR only" for per-request parts, and "client-side interactivity on top" where needed.
